title: A workplace built on care, craft, and community.
description: Costco's Code of Ethics is a way of working. Here's how it shows up day-to-day in India.

pillars.title: Belonging
pillars.body: Inclusive teams where every voice counts. Employee resource groups, women in tech, and accessibility-first events.

pillars.title: Growth
pillars.body: Learning budgets, certifications, internal mobility, and Costco-funded technical academies.

pillars.title: Wellbeing
pillars.body: Comprehensive health cover for you and your dependents, mental wellness support, and parental leave.

pillars.title: Sustainability
pillars.body: Green campuses, reduced printing, clean-commute incentives, and CSR aligned with India initiatives.

pillars.title: Community
pillars.body: Hackathons, demo days, family days, and warehouse experience visits.

pillars.title: Craft
pillars.body: Engineering excellence guilds, design critiques, and a culture of curious tinkering.
